# v2.0.3

## Changes

- Fixed manual `@ai-review` triggers for GitLab 14.5 Note Hook payloads that omit `object_attributes.action`.
- Missing MR note action is now treated as `create`; explicit non-create actions such as `delete` are still ignored.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.3-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.3-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
